headlines.description: Newcastle United marked their return to the Champions League after a two-decade absence with a hard-fought 0-0 draw with AC Milan at San Siro on Tuesday, as the Serie A club spurned numerous opportunities in the Group F opener.
headlines.shortLinkText: Newcastle hold Milan to draw in UCL return

headlines.description: RB Leipzig substitute Benjamin Šeško scored late to seal a 3-1 win at Swiss champion Young Boys in their Champions League opener on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leipzig pull away from Young Boys in UCL opener

headlines.description: Barcelona's new signing João Félix struck twice in a 5-0 demolition of visiting Royal Antwerp in their Champions League Group H opener.
headlines.shortLinkText: Felix nets 2, Barca score 5 in rout of Antwerp

headlines.description: Feyenoord marked their return to the group phase of the Champions League after a five-year absence with 2-0 win over nine-man Celtic on Tuesday to get their campaign off to a winning start.
headlines.shortLinkText: Feyenoord beat nine-man Celtic to start UCL

headlines.description: Lazio goalkeeper Ivan Provedel secured a crucial point for his team against Atletico Madrid on Tuesday when he headed in the equaliser late in a 1-1 draw.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lazio GK scores late equalizer against Atletico

name: Red Star Belgrade at Manchester City

headlines.description: Holders Manchester City recovered from falling a goal behind to outclass Red Star Belgrade 3-1 in their Group G opener with Julián Álvarez scoring twice at The Etihad on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Álvarez fires UCL holders Man City to opening win

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappe was on form again as Paris St Germain kicked off their Champions League campaign with a 2-0 home victory over Borussia Dortmund on Tuesday, showing glimpses of what might be under new coach Luis Enrique.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappe leads PSG to UCL win over Dortmund

headlines.description: Galeno scored two goals and set up a third as FC Porto eased to a 3-1 win over Ukrainian champion Shakhtar Donetsk in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Galeno double gives Porto win over Shakhtar

name: 1. FC Union Berlin at Real Madrid

headlines.description: Jude Bellingham scored deep in added time as Real Madrid wore down a resilient Union Berlin to claim a 1-0 win at the Santiago Bernabeu in their Group C opener on Wednesday, spoiling the Bundesliga side's Champions League debut.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bellingham gives Real Madrid last-gasp UCL win

headlines.description: Arsenal enjoyed a triumphant return to the Champions League with a 4-0 thrashing of outclassed PSV Eindhoven in Group B as their impressive start to the season continued on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal thrash PSV in impressive return to UCL

headlines.description: Bayern Munich struck twice in four minutes in the first half to set them on their way to a 4-3 victory over an embattled Manchester United on Wednesday and make a winning start in Champions League Group A.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane scores in Bayern's UCL win over Man United

headlines.description: A late own goal by Braga defender Sikou Niakate handed Italian champions Napoli a 2-1 away win in an entertaining Champions League Group C clash on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Napoli edge Braga after late own goal

headlines.description: Lautaro Martinez's late goal salvaged a 1-1 draw for runners-up Inter Milan at Real Sociedad as they kicked off their Champions League campaign on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Martinez rescues draw for Inter at Real Sociedad

headlines.description: Portugal's Braga scored a stoppage-time winner through Andre Castro after coming from two goals down to snatch a 3-2 win at Union Berlin in their Champions League Group C match on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Braga stun Union Berlin with last-gasp winner

headlines.description: Mikel Oyarzabal and Brais Mendez scored first-half goals to give Real Sociedad a comfortable 2-0 win at Salzburg in their Champions League Group D clash on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Oyarzabal and Mendez on target as Real Sociedad win 2-0 at Salzburg

headlines.description: Thomas Muller came off the bench to set up the winning goal for fellow substitute Mathys Tel as Bayern Munich came from a goal down to beat Denmark's FC Copenhagen 2-1 in their Champions League Group A clash.
headlines.shortLinkText: Muller turns back clock as Bayern rally for win

headlines.description: Inter Milan beat Benfica 1-0 in their Champions League Group D match at the San Siro on Tuesday thanks to a brilliant goal from Marcus Thuram.
headlines.shortLinkText: Thuram goal hands Inter Milan win over Benfica

headlines.description: Lens' Elye Wahi scored one goal and set up another in a sterling performance to secure a 2-1 home win against Arsenal and put his side top of Champions League Group B on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal beaten at Lens after Saka injury

headlines.description: Manchester United's miserable season continued as they slumped to a 3-2 defeat at home to Galatasaray on Tuesday to leave them bottom of Champions League Group A and in all kinds of disarray.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man Utd bottom of UCL group after loss to Gala

headlines.description: Real Madrid fought back to secure a barnstorming 3-2 win at Napoli in their Champions League Group C clash on Tuesday, with the Italian side's keeper Alex Meret scoring an unfortunate own goal to hand the Spaniards victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid rally for win in thrilling match with Napoli

headlines.description: Alvaro Morata scored a brace to help Atletico Madrid fight back and secure a frantic 3-2 win over Feyenoord in their Champions League Group E clash on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atletico rally past Feyenoord with Morata double

headlines.description: AC Milan were frustrated by a disciplined Borussia Dortmund as their Group F fixture in the Champions League ended in a cagey 0-0 draw at Signal Iduna Park on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Milan frustrated in draw with Borussia Dortmund

headlines.description: Lazio pulled off a last-gasp 2-1 away victory over Celtic thanks to an added-time Pedro Rodriguez header in a pulsating Champions League Group E match on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Last-gasp Pedro goal gives Lazio win at Celtic

headlines.description: Substitute Ferran Torres scored to give Barcelona a hard-fought 1-0 win at Porto in their Champions League Group H clash on Wednesday, with the Spanish side finishing with 10 men after Gavi got a second yellow card for a foul in added time.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barcelona hang on for fortunate win at Porto

headlines.description: A rampant Newcastle United put in a stellar showing to secure a superb 4-1 victory over French champions Paris St Germain in their first Champions League home match in 20 years on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Superb Newcastle crush PSG for famous UCL win

headlines.description: Holders Manchester City struck twice in the final minutes through Julian Alvarez and Jeremy Doku to beat hosts RB Leipzig 3-1 on Wednesday and rebound from successive domestic defeats to take control of Champions League Group G with maximum points.
headlines.shortLinkText: City strike late to beat Leipzig, snap losing run

name: Young Boys at Red Star Belgrade

headlines.description: Bayern Munich soaked up intense pressure from Galatasaray for more than 70 minutes before striking twice to carve out a 3-1 victory on Tuesday that kept them firmly top of their Champions League Group A.
headlines.shortLinkText: Kane helps Bayern extend record UCL win streak

headlines.description: Inter Milan's Alexis Sanchez and Hakan Calhanoglu were both on target as the Italian side beat Austrian champions Salzburg 2-1 in Champions League Group D on Tuesday to go top of the standings.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sanchez scores as Inter edge Salzburg in UCL

headlines.description: Napoli scored a second half goal through Giacomo Raspadori to snatch a 1-0 victory at Union Berlin in their Champions League Group C match on Tuesday and stretch their opponents' losing run to nine straight games in all competitions.
headlines.shortLinkText: Napoli snatch win at strugglers Union Berlin

headlines.description: A second-half goal by Brais Mendez gave Real Sociedad a 1-0 win away to Benfica that moved them above Inter Milan, who beat FC Salzburg 2-1 earlier on Tuesday, to the top of Champions League Group D on goal difference.
headlines.shortLinkText: Real Sociedad beat Benfica to go top of UCL group

headlines.description: Real Madrid's Rodrygo and Jude Bellingham got on the scoresheet in each half to secure a 2-1 win at Sporting Braga in their Champions League Group C clash on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid win makes it 3-for-3 in UCL group games

headlines.description: Lens forward Elye Wahi cancelled out Johan Bakayoko's opener for PSV Eindhoven to salvage a home 1-1 draw in Champions League Group B on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lens come from behind to rescue draw against PSV

headlines.description: Harry Maguire headed a second-half goal and goalkeeper Andre Onana saved a penalty deep in stoppage time to power Manchester United to a 1-0 victory over FC Copenhagen on Tuesday for their first victory in the Champions League this season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Maguire scores, Onana saves PK in Man Utd win

headlines.description: Gabriel Martinelli and Gabriel Jesus scored goals either side of halftime as Arsenal completed a 2-1 Champions League victory at Sevilla on Tuesday, a hard-fought win that takes them to the top of Group B at the midway point of the pool stage.
headlines.shortLinkText: Martinelli, Jesus lead Arsenal to key win at Sevilla

headlines.description: First-half goals from Ferran Torres and Fermin Lopez helped Barcelona secure a 2-1 home win against Shakhtar Donetsk in their Champions League Group H tie on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barcelona stay perfect in UCL ahead of Clasico

headlines.description: Feyenoord beat visitors Lazio 3-1 on Wednesday thanks to a double from Mexico's Santiago Gimenez and a strike from Ramiz Zerrouki to move top of Champions League Group E.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mexico's Gimenez nets two in Feyenoord UCL win

headlines.description: Striker Evanilson came off the bench to score a hat-trick as Porto rallied from a goal down to beat hosts Royal Antwerp 4-1 in Champions League Group H on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Evanilson hat-trick leads Porto to win at Antwerp

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid battled back twice to draw 2-2 at Celtic in a thrilling Champions League Group E clash on Wednesday in which the Spanish side played the last few minutes with 10 men.
headlines.shortLinkText: Celtic can't hold off 10-man Atleti in thrilling draw

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund rekindled their hopes in Champions League Group F with a gritty 1-0 victory at Newcastle United thanks to Felix Nmecha's clinical first-half strike on Wednesday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund hang on for vital win at Newcastle

headlines.description: Another Kylian Mbappe moment of magic and a Randal Kolo Muani goal helped Paris St Germain beat a toothless AC Milan 3-0 at the Parc des Princes to go top of their Champions League Group F on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappe steals show as PSG outclass woeful Milan

name: Red Star Belgrade at RB Leipzig

headlines.description: RB Leipzig strengthened their hold on second place in Champions League Group G with a 3-1 victory over gritty Red Star Belgrade on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leipzig battle past Red Star to tighten hold on Group G second

headlines.description: Erling Haaland ended his goal drought with a brace while Manuel Akanji scored on his return to his homeland as reigning champions Manchester City all but secured their spot in the knockout stage of the Champions League with a 3-1 win over Swiss side...
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland ends UCL drought with double in City win

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund scored once in each half to beat Newcastle United 2-0 in the Champions League on Tuesday and provisionally take over the lead in Group F with two games remaining.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dominant Dortmund beat Newcastle for 2nd time

headlines.description: Danylo Sikan's towering header gave Shakhtar Donetsk a 1-0 win against LaLiga champions Barcelona in their Champions League Group H clash on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barca stunned by fearless Shakhtar in Hamburg

headlines.description: AC Milan striker Olivier Giroud's powerful header early in the second half secured a 2-1 Champions League Group F home victory over Paris St Germain in a pulsating match on Tuesday for the first win in this season's competition by the Italian side.
headlines.shortLinkText: Giroud leads Milan revenge on PSG at San Siro

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid's Antoine Griezmann and Alvaro Morata both struck twice to help their side thrash 10-man Celtic 6-0 in the Champions League on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Griezmann nets brace as Atleti hit 6 past Celtic

headlines.description: FC Porto stayed on course for a place in the Champions League last 16 with a 2-0 home victory over 10-man Royal Antwerp on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pepe becomes oldest Champions League scorer

headlines.description: A first-half goal by Ciro Immobile handed Lazio a 1-0 home win over Feyenoord in the Champions League on Tuesday to move Maurizio Sarri's side up to second in Group E.
headlines.shortLinkText: Immobile earns Lazio 1-0 win over Feyenoord

headlines.description: Erling Haaland scored twice against Young Boys as holders Manchester City reached the last 16 of the Champions League with two group games remaining.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland double takes Man City to UCL knockouts

name: RB Leipzig at Red Star Belgrade

headlines.description: Goals from Xavi Simons and Lois Openda gave RB Leipzig a 2-1 win against Red Star Belgrade in Champions League Group G on Tuesday to secure a place in the knockout stages.
headlines.shortLinkText: Simons strikes again as Leipzig reach UCL last 16

headlines.description: Union Berlin scored a second-half equaliser against the run of play to snatch a 1-1 draw at Napoli in the Champions League on Wednesday and snap their 12-game losing run across all competitions but they still bowed out with two games left.
headlines.shortLinkText: Napoli stumble to draw with eliminated Union

headlines.description: Real Sociedad edged closer to a place in the knockout stage of the Champions League with a comfortable 3-1 win over Benfica in Group D on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sociedad's early blitz too much for Benfica

headlines.description: Arsenal returned to winning ways with a routine 2-0 defeat of Sevilla to take a big step towards qualification for the Champions League knockout rounds on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal beat Sevilla again to stay atop Group B

headlines.description: Harry Kane struck twice in seven minutes late in the game to guide Bayern Munich to a 2-1 victory over Galatasaray on Wednesday and secure a spot in the Champions League knockout stage.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Kane double sends Bayern into UCL last 16

headlines.description: Manchester United gave up a two-goal lead in a breathless 4-3 Champions League loss to FC Copenhagen on Wednesday after Marcus Rashford was shown a red card.
headlines.shortLinkText: Copenhagen shock Man United after Rashford red

headlines.description: Luuk de Jong scored early to give PSV Eindhoven their first win in Champions League Group B as a 1-0 home victory over Lens on Wednesday,
headlines.shortLinkText: PSV jump from bottom to second after edging Lens

headlines.description: A late penalty by Lautaro Martinez helped Inter Milan book their spot in the Champions League last 16 with a 1-0 win at Salzburg on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Inter through to UCL knockouts after late penalty

headlines.description: Brahim Diaz, Vinicius Jr and Rodrygo scored as Real Madrid cruised into the last 16 of the Champions League with two group games remaining after a 3-0 victory over Portuguese side Braga on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid blank Braga to book place in round of 16

headlines.description: Two late goals by Lazio captain Ciro Immobile earned them a 2-0 home win over bottom side Celtic in Champions League Group E on Tuesday, ending Celtic's European hopes.
headlines.shortLinkText: Celtic out of Europe after late Immobile double

headlines.description: Shakhtar Donetsk defender Mykola Matviyenko's glancing header secured a 1-0 win over Antwerp on Tuesday to keep alive their hopes of a last-16 Champions League spot.
headlines.shortLinkText: Shakhtar beat Antwerp to keep UCL hopes alive

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund booked their spot in the Champions League last 16 by beating AC Milan 3-1 at the San Siro in a lively Group F clash on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund beat Milan to clinch UCL last-16 spot

headlines.description: Joao Cancelo and Joao Felix scored in each half to earn Barcelona a 2-1 comeback win at home against Porto on Tuesday that booked their spot in the Champions League knockout rounds for the first time in three seasons.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barca into last-16 after narrow win over Porto

headlines.description: Two own goals plus a brilliant, hooked volley handed Atletico Madrid a 3-1 victory away over Feyenoord in Rotterdam on Tuesday and a place in the next round of the Champions League, while eliminating their Dutch hosts.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atleti clinch UCL knockouts with win over Feyenoord

headlines.description: Manchester City clawed their way back from two goals down to beat RB Leipzig 3-2 and clinch top spot in Group G on Tuesday with one game remaining.
headlines.shortLinkText: Haaland breaks more records in City comeback

headlines.description: Kylian Mbappé struck a controversial penalty deep in stoppage time to earn Paris St Germain a 1-1 draw against a valiant Newcastle United and keep their Champions League destiny in their own hands on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Mbappé pen saves PSG in Newcastle draw

name: Red Star Belgrade at Young Boys

headlines.description: Manchester United gave up a two-goal lead in a thrilling 3-3 draw at Galatasaray on Wednesday that keeps alive their slim hopes of reaching the Champions League last 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Utd surrender two-goal lead in Galatasaray draw

headlines.description: U.S. international Ricardo Pepi came off the bench to help PSV Eindhoven rally from two goals down against Sevilla and move into a good position to advance to the knockout stage of the Champions League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pepi nets late PSV winner to clinch knockout spot

headlines.description: Arsenal blasted their way into the last 16 of the Champions League on a freezing night at The Emirates on Wednesday, crushing RC Lens 6-0.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal demolish Lens to reach UCL last 16

headlines.description: FC Copenhagen earned a goalless draw at already-qualified Bayern Munich in their Champions League Group A match on Wednesday to snap their opponents' 17-game winning run in group-stage matches and stay in contention for a second-place finish.
headlines.shortLinkText: VAR overrules Bayern pen to end UCL win streak

headlines.description: Inter Milan fought back from 3-0 down to rescue a point with three goals in the second half in a pulsating 3-3 draw at Benfica in a Champions League Group D clash on Wednesday after Joao Mario netted a hat-trick for the hosts.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sanchez seals Inter rally in draw with Benfica

headlines.description: Ten-man Braga came from a goal down to draw 1-1 at home with Union Berlin in Champions League Group C on Wednesday to keep alive their hopes of reaching the last 16.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ten-man Braga keep last-16 hopes alive with Union draw

headlines.description: Two late goals by 19-year-old Nico Paz and Joselu gave Real Madrid a 4-2 fightback win against Napoli on Wednesday, securing the top spot in Champions League Group C with one round of matches remaining.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid win thriller with Napoli to clinch top spot

headlines.description: Real Sociedad failed to find a clinical touch in front of goal in a disappointing 0-0 Champions League draw with visiting Salzburg on Wednesday, but remain top of their Group D.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sociedad stay top despite Salzburg stalemate

headlines.description: Angelo Fulgini's goal deep in stoppage time gave RC Lens a 2-1 win at home to Sevilla on Tuesday that secured third place in Champions League Group B and a spot in the Europa League.
headlines.shortLinkText: Lens beat Sevilla to secure Europa League place

headlines.description: A much changed Arsenal were pegged back to draw 1-1 away at PSV in the Champions League on Tuesday as both sides concluded their Group B campaign
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal close out CL group stage with PSV draw

name: Real Madrid at 1. FC Union Berlin

headlines.description: Real Madrid's Dani Ceballos scored an 89th-minute winner to secure a 3-2 victory at Union Berlin in their final Champions League Group C match on Tuesday, to make it six wins from six matches as the Germans ended their European run in last place.
headlines.shortLinkText: Late Ceballos goal seals perfect Madrid group run

headlines.description: Lukas Lerager scored a second-half goal and was sent off as FC Copenhagen reached the knockout stages of the Champions League for the first time in over a decade as they defeated Galatasaray 1-0 at home on Tuesday to secure second spot in Group A.
headlines.shortLinkText: Copenhagen beat Galatasaray to progress in UCL

headlines.description: Real Sociedad held Inter Milan to a goalless draw on Tuesday to secure the top spot in Champions League Group D
headlines.shortLinkText: Sociedad hold Inter to draw to secure top spot

headlines.description: Manchester United's slim chance of a Champions League round-of-16 spot ended with a 1-0 defeat by group winners Bayern Munich at Old Trafford on Tuesday, piling more misery on Erik ten Hag's beleaguered team in an already rocky season.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man United out of Europe with loss to Bayern

headlines.description: Napoli eased into the knockout stages of the Champions League with two first-half goals in a 2-0 home win over Sporting Braga on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Napoli into CL knockout stage after Braga win

name: Manchester City at Red Star Belgrade

headlines.description: Man City's Micah Hamilton scored on his debut as they stretched their unbeaten run in Europe to 20 games with a 3-2 victory over Red Star Belgrade
headlines.shortLinkText: Hamilton scores on debut in City win at Red Star

headlines.description: Royal Antwerp won a first Champions League game  with a surprise 3-2 home victory over Barcelona, securing their first points in Group H
headlines.shortLinkText: Barca fall to shock 3-2 loss at Royal Antwerp

headlines.description: Antoine Griezmann and Samuel Lino scored in each half to give Atletico Madrid a 2-0 win over Lazio on Wednesday that secured them top spot in Champions League Group E.
headlines.shortLinkText: Griezmann, Lino goals help Atleti win Group E

headlines.description: Paris St Germain drew 1-1 at Group F winners Borussia Dortmund on Wednesday to secure second place and a spot in the Champions League knockout stage in their final group match.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSG survive chaotic day to reach UCL knockouts

headlines.description: Porto's Galeno scored twice and set up two others in a 5-3 home win over Shakhtar Donetsk on Wednesday to secure a spot in the Champions League knockout stages.
headlines.shortLinkText: Galeno shines as Porto seal UCL knockout spot

headlines.description: AC Milan's 2-1 win at Newcastle United in the Champions League proved to be in vain as both teams were eliminated from the competition Wednesday, though the Italian club claimed a place in the Europa League playoff round.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pulisic scores but Milan, Newcastle both exit UCL

headlines.description: Manchester City survived a brief scare to beat FC Copenhagen 3-1 in the first leg of their Champions League round-of-16 at the Parken Stadium on Tuesday, with Phil Foden scoring late to ensure a two-goal cushion ahead of the second-leg.
headlines.shortLinkText: Man City ease past Copenhagen in UCL 1st leg

headlines.description: Real Madrid's Brahim Díaz scored a stunning goal after a solo run as they beat hosts RB Leipzig 1-0 on Tuesday to take a clear advantage into their Champions League round-of-16 second leg next month.
headlines.shortLinkText: Brahim Díaz golazo gives Madrid edge on Leipzig

headlines.description: Ciro Immobile scored a 69th-minute penalty to earn hosts Lazio a 1-0 victory over 10-man Bayern Munich on Wednesday in their Champions League round of 16 first-leg clash.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern woes mount with 1st-leg loss at Lazio

headlines.description: Second-half goals from Kylian Mbappé and Bradley Barcola secured Paris Saint-Germain a hard-fought 2-0 win over visitors Real Sociedad in the first leg of their round-of-16 Champions League tie on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappé on target as PSG beat Real Sociedad

headlines.description: A late goal from substitute Marko Arnautovic gave Inter Milan a 1-0 home victory against Atletico Madrid in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arnautovic strike gives Inter win over Atletico

headlines.description: Donyell Malen scored a superb goal against his former side but a second-half penalty from Luuk de Jong earned a 1-1 draw for PSV Eindhoven in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie against Borussia Dortmund at the Philips Stadion on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: PSV fight back to draw with Dortmund in 1st leg

headlines.description: FC Porto snatched a shock last-gasp 1-0 victory against Arsenal with Galeno netting a sublime effort deep in stoppage time in their Champions League round-of-16 tie Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Porto stun shot-shy Arsenal with last-gasp winner

headlines.description: Napoli fought back to hold visitors Barcelona to a dour 1-1 draw in the first leg of their Champions League last-16 tie on Wednesday thanks to a goal from Nigeria forward Victor Osimhen.
headlines.shortLinkText: Napoli rally to draw with Barca in last-16 first leg

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Bayern Munich advance 3-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Bayern Munich advance 3-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: Bayern Munich top scorer Harry Kane struck once in either half to steer the Germans to a 3-0 win over Italy's Lazio on Tuesday and into the Champions League quarterfinals with a 3-1 aggregate victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Bayern turn Lazio tie around with Kane double

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Paris Saint-Germain advance 4-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Paris Saint-Germain advance 4-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: Paris St Germain's Kylian Mbappe scored twice to lead them into the Champions League quarterfinals with a comfortable 2-1 win at Real Sociedad in their last-16 second leg that wrapped up a 4-1 aggregate victory Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappe stars as PSG cruise into UCL quarters

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Manchester City advance 6-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Manchester City advance 6-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: Holders Manchester City cruised into the Champions League quarterfinals with a 3-1 victory over FC Copenhagen on Wednesday in their round of second leg, a 10th consecutive win in the competition that wrapped up a 6-2 aggregate triumph.
headlines.shortLinkText: Holders Man City cruise into UCL quarterfinals

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 2-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 2-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: Real Madrid withstood an onslaught from RB Leipzig to secure a 1-1 draw in the second leg of their Champions League last-16 tie that sent them through to the quarterfinals with a 2-1 aggregate victory Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Viní Jr. helps Madrid hold off Leipzig to reach QF

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Arsenal advance 4-2 on penalties
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Arsenal advance 4-2 on penalties

headlines.description: Arsenal survived a penalty shootout to scrape past Porto and reach the quarterfinals of the Champions League for the first time in 14 years after a tense round-of-16 duel had ended 1-1 on aggregate on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal into UCL quarters for 1st time since 2010

headlines.description: Barcelona reached the Champions League quarterfinals for the first time in four years after a 3-1 win over Napoli in their round-of-16 second leg gave them a 4-2 aggregate victory on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Barça beat Napoli to make 1st UCL QF post-Messi

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Atlético Madrid advance 3-2 on penalties
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Atlético Madrid advance 3-2 on penalties

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid needed a penalty shootout to edge past Inter Milan and reach the quarter-finals of the Champions League after an exciting last-16 clash ended 2-2 on aggregate on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Atleti cap UCL rally with shootout win over Inter

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Borussia Dortmund advance 3-1 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Borussia Dortmund advance 3-1 on aggregate

headlines.description: Jadon Sancho and Marco Reus scored as Borussia Dortmund secured a 2-0 win over PSV Eindhoven on Wednesday and a Champions League last-eight place for the first time in three years with a 3-1 aggregate victory.
headlines.shortLinkText: Sancho fires Dortmund past PSV into UCL QF

headlines.description: Bayern Munich striker Harry Kane returned to north London to score his customary goal against Arsenal as the first leg of their Champions League quarter-final tie ended 2-2 on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Arsenal denied late pen in home draw with Bayern

headlines.description: Real Madrid and Manchester City slugged out a thrilling 3-3 draw in a rip-roaring Champions League quarterfinal clash in the Spanish capital Tuesday, leaving the tie between the last two holders of the trophy wide open for the second leg next week.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid, City trade stunners in 6-goal thriller

headlines.description: Atletico Madrid struck twice in a dominant first half but had to survive a late fightback from Borussia Dortmund before earning a 2-1 win in their Champions League quarter-final first leg on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Advantage Atlético after narrow win over Dortmund

headlines.description: Brazil forward Raphinha scored twice to help Barcelona secure a 3-2 win at Paris St Germain in their Champions League quarter-final first leg on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Raphinha brace helps Barça to 1st-leg win at PSG

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Paris Saint-Germain advance 6-4 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Paris Saint-Germain advance 6-4 on aggregate

headlines.description: Paris Saint-Germain's Kylian Mbappe scored twice in the second half to help guide his side to a 4-1 comeback win at 10-man Barcelona in their Champions League quarterfinal second leg to wrap up a 6-4 aggregate victory on Tuesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Mbappé seals PSG comeback to eliminate Barça

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Borussia Dortmund advance 5-4 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Borussia Dortmund advance 5-4 on aggregate

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund stormed into the Champions League semi-finals with a rip-roaring 4-2 home win over Atletico Madrid on Tuesday that saw them fight back from a 2-1 defeat in the first leg to win the tie 5-4 on aggregate.
headlines.shortLinkText: Dortmund dump Atleti in 2nd leg to reach semis

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Bayern Munich advance 3-2 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Bayern Munich advance 3-2 on aggregate

headlines.description: Bayern Munich's Joshua Kimmich powered in a 63rd-minute header to give the Germans a 1-0 victory over Arsenal in the Champions League on Wednesday and send them through to the semi-finals for the first time in four years with a 3-2 aggregate win.
headlines.shortLinkText: Gritty Bayern edge out Arsenal to reach semifinal

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Real Madrid advance 4-3 on penalties
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Tied on aggregate - Real Madrid advance 4-3 on penalties

headlines.description: Real Madrid's Antonio Rudiger scored the decisive penalty to lift his team to an edge-of-your-seat 4-3 shootout victory over holders Manchester City after their Champions League quarterfinal tie finished 4-4 on aggregate.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid win shootout to knock City out of UCL

headlines.description: Real Madrid's Vinicius Jr scored twice, including an 83rd minute penalty, to snatch a 2-2 draw at Bayern Munich in an entertaining Champions League semi-final, first leg on Tuesday, leaving the tie wide open.
headlines.shortLinkText: Vini nets brace as Madrid draw 2-2 at Bayern

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund's Niclas Fullkrug fired in a first-half goal to seal a 1-0 victory over visitors Paris St Germain in their Champions League semi-final first leg on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Advantage Dortmund after narrow win over PSG

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Borussia Dortmund advance 2-0 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Borussia Dortmund advance 2-0 on aggregate

headlines.description: Borussia Dortmund reached the Champions League final after Mats Hummels' second-half goal earned a 1-0 victory at PSG on Tuesday for a 2-0 aggregate win.
headlines.shortLinkText: UCL underdogs Dortmund beat PSG to reach final

notes.text: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 4-3 on aggregate
notes.headline: 2nd Leg - Real Madrid advance 4-3 on aggregate

headlines.description: Real Madrid's Joselu scored twice in the final minutes as they fought back from the brink of elimination to reach the Champions League final with a dramatic 2-1 second-leg win over Bayern Munich on Wednesday.
headlines.shortLinkText: Madrid rally late to stun Bayern, reach UCL final
